name: Plastic
description: $PLASTIC is an SPL token on the Solana blockchain designed to address plastic pollution impacting oceans, marine life, and human life. It allocates creator fees from transactions via BlueWhale Tek for automated on-chain distribution: 1% to buybacks and burns for deflation, 20% to smaller holders (Shrimp tier, 0.1%-0.5% of supply), 49% to larger holders (Whale tier, 0.5%+ of supply) as passive SOL rewards, and 30% to a dev wallet fully donated to community-voted nonprofits focused on ocean cleanups, marine rescues, and biodiversity preservation. Donations are tracked publicly on-chain for transparency. The project integrates real-world impact through planned verifiable Plastic Credits (1 credit = 1 kg plastic removed/prevented), governed by holders, with revenue supporting further conservation efforts. It originated from a community takeover and is led by a doxxed founder emphasizing ethical, transparent operations.
